Tracks principal to calculate yield and applies 10% yield fee on redemption. Key properties: - Non-rebasing: Share balances stay constant, share value increases - Principal tracking: Accurately calculates yield at redemption - Yield fee: 10% of yield goes to treasury on redemption - Privileged path: Adapter can deposit/redeem without fees","kind":"dev","methods":{"allowance(address,address)":{"details":"See {IERC20-allowance}."},"approve(address,uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC20-approve}. approve(address,uint256).details: See {IERC20-approve}. NOTE: If `amount` is the maximum `uint256`, the allowance is not updated on `transferFrom`. This is semantically equivalent to an infinite approval. Requirements: - `spender` cannot be the zero address.

params._reserveId: The reserve ID for USDC in the Spoke

decreaseAllowance(address,uint256).details: Atomically decreases the allowance granted to `spender` by the caller. This is an alternative to {approve} that can be used as a mitigation for problems described in {IERC20-approve}. Emits an {Approval} event indicating the updated allowance. Requirements: - `spender` cannot be the zero address. - `spender` must have allowance for the caller of at least `subtractedValue`.

increaseAllowance(address,uint256).details: Atomically increases the allowance granted to `spender` by the caller. This is an alternative to {approve} that can be used as a mitigation for problems described in {IERC20-approve}. Emits an {Approval} event indicating the updated allowance. Requirements: - `spender` cannot be the zero address.

name().details: Returns the name of the token.

redeem(uint256,address,address).details: Applies 10% yield fee unless caller is privileged adapter

params._adapter: New adapter address (can be zero to disable)

symbol().details: Returns the symbol of the token, usually a shorter version of the name.

transfer(address,uint256).details: See {IERC20-transfer}. Requirements: - `to` cannot be the zero address. - the caller must have a balance of at least `amount`.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: See {IERC20-transferFrom}. Emits an {Approval} event indicating the updated allowance. This is not required by the EIP. See the note at the beginning of {ERC20}. NOTE: Does not update the allowance if the current allowance is the maximum `uint256`. Requirements: - `from` and `to` cannot be the zero address. - `from` must have a balance of at least `amount`. - the caller must have allowance for ``from``'s tokens of at least `amount`.

YIELD_FEE_BPS().notice: Yield fee in basis points (10% = 1000 bps)

deposit(uint256,address).notice: Deposit underlying assets and receive vault shares

getUserAssets(address).notice: Get user's total assets (shares converted to underlying)

previewRedeem(uint256,address).notice: Preview redeem - get assets after fees

redeem(uint256,address,address).notice: Redeem vault shares for underlying assets

reserveId().notice: The reserve ID in the Spoke

totalAssets().notice: Get total assets in the vault (including yield)

userCostBasisPerShare(address).notice: Per-user cost basis per share, scaled by 1e18

documentation.text:
@title IArmadaTreasury
 @notice Interface for ArmadaTreasury fee recording
@notice Yield fee in basis points (10% = 1000 bps)
@notice Basis points denominator
@notice The Aave Spoke contract (or MockAaveSpoke)
@notice The underlying token (USDC)
@notice The reserve ID in the Spoke
@notice Treasury address for yield fees
@notice Contract owner
@notice Privileged adapter (can bypass fees)
@notice Total principal deposited (for yield calculation)
@notice Precision scalar for cost basis (1e18)

@notice Update treasury address
 @param _treasury New treasury address

@notice Set privileged adapter address
 @param _adapter New adapter address (can be zero to disable)

@notice Transfer ownership
 @param newOwner New owner address

@notice Get total assets in the vault (including yield)
 @return Total underlying assets

@notice Get the underlying token decimals
 @return Token decimals (6 for USDC)
@notice Convert assets to shares using current exchange rate
@notice Convert shares to assets using current exchange rate
